title: Senior Doctor - Philips India Healthcare - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Philips India Healthcare - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Philips India Healthcare in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Philips India Healthcare:
Philips India Healthcare is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Philips India Healthcare!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
